name: RADIAN GROUP INC
business: As a leading U.S. private mortgage insurer, Radian provides solutions that expand access to affordable, responsible and sustainable homeownership and helps borrowers achieve their dream of owning a home. Our Mortgage Insurance segment aggregates, manages and distributes U.S. mortgage credit risk for the benefit of mortgage lending institutions and mortgage credit investors, principally through private mortgage insurance on residential first-lien mortgage loans. With our acquisition of Inigo in February 2026, Radian Group has become a global, multi-line specialty insurer.
sellsTo: mortgage originators such as mortgage banks, commercial banks, savings institutions, credit unions and community banks

exposures.sentence: As a leading U.S. private mortgage insurer, Radian provides solutions that expand access to affordable, responsible and sustainable homeownership and helps borrowers achieve their dream of owning a home.

Private mortgage insurance plays an important role in the U.S. housing finance system because it supports affordable homeownership, while helping to protect mortgage lenders, investors and the GSEs, who are the primary beneficiaries of our mortgage insurance, by mitigating default-related losses on residential mortgage loans.
We also insure against risks related to cybersecurity and cyberattacks.

To help achieve these objectives, we seek to continuously improve and leverage our operational excellence, while harnessing data, analytics and technology as a strategic differentiator across our businesses.
Our businesses, results of operations and financial performance could be adversely impacted by climate change and natural catastrophes, including extreme weather events.

catalysts.sentence: The acquisition was completed on February 2, 2026; see Inigo Acquisition below for additional information.

catalysts.event: Divestiture of Mortgage Conduit, Title and Real Estate Services businesses expected completion
catalysts.sentence: announced the intent to divest of our Mortgage Conduit, Title and Real Estate Services businesses, which is expected to be completed no later than the end of the third quarter of 2026.
